title: BCHADSpec
description: Normalized feature specification — the primary input to the BCHAD software factory. Describes the entity, fields, permissions, UI requirements, and compliance constraints for a feature to be generated.

pattern.description: Generation pattern that determines the DAG template and stage set.

permissions.description: Permission scope required to access this feature (e.g. 'payment_methods:manage').

audit.description: When true, every state-changing operation must include an audit log call.

EntitySpec.title: EntitySpec
EntitySpec.description: The domain entity to be generated.

fields.description: List of fields on the entity. At least one field is required.

FieldSpec.title: FieldSpec
FieldSpec.description: A single field on the entity.

values.description: Allowed enum values. Required when kind is 'enum'.

sensitive.description: When true, the field must use the Vault integration pattern.

required.description: When true, the field is non-nullable in the database and required in the form.

needs_clarification.description: When true, the NL translator could not determine this field's intent unambiguously.

reason.description: Explanation of why clarification is needed. Only present when needs_clarification is true.

UISpec.title: UISpec
UISpec.description: Which UI views to generate for this entity.

ComplianceFlags.title: ComplianceFlags
ComplianceFlags.description: Compliance requirements that affect code generation. Auto-detected from the product profile.

soc2.description: Product is under SOC 2 compliance. Enables audit logging and data handling constraints.

hipaa.description: Product is under HIPAA compliance. Enables PHI handling patterns and stricter access controls.
